response.step_by_step_log: The video was reviewed to identify any vocal music. The video is comprised of spoken announcements by a virtual YouTuber and a credit roll accompanied by an instrumental background track. The song 'Monopoly' is mentioned in the dialogue but is not played as a vocal performance. Therefore, no vocal music was detected, and all scenes have 'contains_vocal_music' set to false. No search was necessary for song lyrics.
response.global_summary: A promotional announcement video for the event 'Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 -Life is GAME-'. The video consists of monologues and a credit roll, accompanied by background music. No vocal songs are performed or played in this clip.

scenes.description: Introductory monologue by Aki Rosenthal announcing event details.
Credit roll displaying staff and contributors, with instrumental background music.
